Name: Sergeant Ossuary "The Man Of Faith" Trook
Description: Sergeant Ossuary Trook served in the Northern Campaign (you haven't heard of it) and was fatally wounded in a desperate battle (you haven't heard of it). On that day, his life was saved by a god (you haven't heard of them). For a while, he devoted his life to seeking out the god who saved him, hoping to find an end to war. Then he decided to cut out the middleman and end war himself.
